triggers_out_of_scope_rejection.description: Agent must reject tasks outside frontend/client-side scope or belonging to a different archetype lane
triggers_out_of_scope_rejection.observable_check: execution_log contains rejection AND query does not involve UI implementation, component authoring, user interaction, client-side state management, or query belongs to BACKEND_DEVELOPER, TEST_ENGINEER, or other non-frontend archetype

triggers_write_boundary_rejection.description: Agent must reject tasks requiring file modifications outside the declared write boundary
triggers_write_boundary_rejection.observable_check: execution_log contains rejection AND query requires modifying files not in declared write boundary

triggers_scope_expansion_rejection.description: Agent must reject tasks expanding scope beyond dispatched vertical slice, or requesting green/refactor without failing red tests, or with failing acceptance checklist
triggers_scope_expansion_rejection.observable_check: execution_log contains rejection AND (query requests expansion beyond authorized slice OR (query requests green/refactor AND no failing red tests exist) OR dispatch brief fails acceptance checklist)

returns_explicit_rejection.description: Agent must return an explicit Rejection statement at the top of the response
returns_explicit_rejection.observable_check: execution_log contains 'REJECTION' or explicit refusal statement at response start

states_specific_rejection_reason.description: Agent must state the specific reason citing the violated condition from the acceptance checklist
states_specific_rejection_reason.observable_check: execution_log contains rejection reason citing specific condition from acceptance checklist (out-of-scope, write boundary, scope expansion, failed checklist, green-without-red)

states_acceptance_criteria.description: Agent must state the acceptance criteria — specific changes that would allow task acceptance — and confirm no files were modified
states_acceptance_criteria.observable_check: execution_log contains 'acceptance criteria' or lists specific changes needed to accept AND explicit confirmation that no files were modified

does_not_begin_implementation_before_che.description: Agent must not begin implementation before dispatch brief passes acceptance checklist
does_not_begin_implementation_before_che.observable_check: execution_log does not contain file edits or implementation before acceptance checklist passes

does_not_modify_outside_write_boundary.description: Agent must not modify files outside the declared write boundary
does_not_modify_outside_write_boundary.observable_check: execution_log does not contain file edits to files outside declared write boundary

does_not_expand_scope.description: Agent must not expand scope beyond dispatched vertical slice or implement features not in dispatch brief
does_not_expand_scope.observable_check: execution_log does not contain implementation of components or features beyond dispatch scope
